habitat: Mexico and Central America; naturalized in warm regions.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary herb with beans in Mexican cooking; traditional antiparasitic folk use (caution).
traditionalUsesDe: Küchenkraut zu Bohnen in Mexiko; traditionell gegen Parasiten (Vorsicht).
preparation: Fresh leaves cooked with food in small culinary amounts.
cautions: Essential oil and high medicinal doses toxic. Culinary leaf amounts only; avoid pregnancy medicinal use.
floweringSeason: Much of the year in tropics
historicalNotes: Nahuatl origin name; inseparable from Mexican bean cookery.
habitatDe: Mexiko und Central America; eingebürgert in warm regions.
preparationDe: Frisch Blätter gekocht mit food in small kulinarisch amounts.
cautionsDe: Ätherisches Öl und high medicinal doses toxic. Kulinarisch Blatt amounts only; vermeiden Schwangerschaft medicinal use.
floweringSeasonDe: Much von die year in tropics
historicalNotesDe: Nahuatl Herkunft name; inseparable von Mexican bean cookery.
